title: coffea rhamnifolia
intro: Coffea rhamnifolia, also known as the bitter coffee bush, is a plant species belonging to the Coffea genus and Rubiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coffea rhamnifolia include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
